settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage app preferences, note templates, imports, exports, and data operations.

general.title: General
general.description: Set app-wide display preferences for note cards, including text truncation and how many fields appear before opening a note.

noteTemplates.title: Note templates
noteTemplates.description: Create and organize note templates, then open a template to manage its nested fields and field settings.

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.description: Move data in and out of NoteStack with JSON backups or XLSX imports while keeping existing notes intact.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Review destructive and maintenance data actions for your local notes, with guarded controls for anything permanent.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Add, edit, reorder, hide, and remove the note fields your cards use.

general.title: Display preferences
general.description: Control how note cards summarize values across the app.

exportImport.title: Export / Import
exportImport.description: Move your notes data in and out as JSON, or append notes from an XLSX worksheet.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Destructive actions stay guarded behind confirmation.

updater.title: Updates
updater.description: Check for newer app versions and install them when they are ready.

noteTypes.title: Templates
noteTypes.description: Create, rename, delete, and open templates to manage their fields.

general.summary: These preferences stay shared across every note template and affect how note cards are summarized on the Notes page.

fields.mergeDateTimeFields: Merge date time fields into "Last updated at field"

hints.optional: Leave either field empty to keep that limit unset.
hints.textTruncationLength: Leave empty to show full text values on cards.
hints.cardFieldDisplayCount: Leave empty to show all configured fields on cards.

status.error: General settings could not be loaded right now.

errors.submit: General settings could not be saved. Try again.

validation.positiveInteger: Enter a whole number greater than 0.

exportImport.summary: Download a full JSON backup or import data from a JSON export or an XLSX worksheet. JSON imports can preserve exported note template relationships or target one selected note template. XLSX imports always append notes into the selected target note template and skip unmatched headers.

hints.selectFile: Select a JSON export or XLSX file to import. Existing notes stay in place and imported notes are appended.
hints.noFile: Choose a JSON or XLSX file before starting an import.
hints.targetOptional: Optional for JSON: leave the target empty to preserve exported note template relationships, or choose one target template to remap imported notes into it.
hints.targetRequired: Required for XLSX: choose which note template should receive imported rows before starting the import.

status.imported: Import completed. Processed {{importedColumns}} fields and appended {{importedNotes}} notes. General settings {{generalSettingsStatus}}.

errors.export: App data could not be exported right now.
errors.invalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON.
errors.invalidShape: The selected file does not match the expected NoteStack export format.
errors.import: The selected data could not be imported right now.
errors.noteTypes: Note templates could not be loaded right now.
errors.targetRequired: Choose a target note template before importing an XLSX file.

unmatchedFields.summary: Some imported fields could not be matched and were skipped:

dangerZone.summary: Permanently remove every note across every note template from your local database.
dangerZone.warning: This action deletes all note content at once and cannot be undone.
dangerZone.hint: Use this only when you want to clear the entire note collection.

confirmDelete.title: Delete all notes
confirmDelete.description: This permanently deletes every saved note. This action cannot be undone.

errors.delete: All notes could not be deleted. Try again.

fields.title: Column title
fields.name: Column name
fields.hidden: Hide this column from note cards and forms

status.error: Fields could not be loaded right now.
status.empty: No fields are configured for this note template yet. Add your first custom field to get started.

confirmDelete.title: Delete field
confirmDelete.description: Choose whether to remove "{{title}}" only from your column setup or also delete all saved note values stored under it.

definitionOnly.label: Delete field definition only
definitionOnly.description: The field is removed from settings, but existing note values stay stored.

definitionAndValues.label: Delete field and saved values
definitionAndValues.description: The field is removed and all note values stored for it are deleted.

errors.submit: The field could not be saved. Try again.
errors.updateHidden: The field visibility could not be updated. Try again.
errors.delete: The field could not be deleted. Try again.
errors.reorder: The field order could not be saved. Try again.

hints.reorder: Drag the handle to reorder fields. Default fields can stay in the order you prefer, but they cannot be deleted.
hints.defaultIdentity: Default fields keep their original name and type.

updater.summary: Stay on the latest desktop build without leaving the app.
updater.hint: Use the button to manually check, download, or install the next available update.

status.unavailable: Automatic updates are unavailable in this environment.
status.idle: You can check for updates whenever you are ready.
status.checking: Checking for a newer app version now.
status.installing: Installing version {{version}} and restarting the app.

errors.load: Updater status could not be loaded right now.
errors.action: The updater action could not be completed.

fields.title: Name
fields.titleHint: This name is shown across settings and note creation.

status.empty: No note templates are configured yet.

delete.title: Delete note template
delete.summary: Choose what should happen to notes that belong to "{{title}}".
delete.lastTypeHint: Deleting the last remaining note template together with its notes will recreate Default so the app always keeps one note template available.
delete.createTargetHint: A new note template will be created first, then notes will move into it.

modes.deleteNotes: Delete this note template and all of its notes
modes.moveNotes: Delete this note template and move its notes to another note template

mapping.title: Field mapping
mapping.emptySource: This note template has no custom fields to map.
mapping.emptyTarget: The selected target note template has no compatible custom fields yet. Unmapped values will remain orphaned.
mapping.emptyTargetForNewType: A newly created note template starts with default fields only, so existing custom values will remain orphaned until matching fields are added later.

validation.targetRequired: Choose a target note template before moving notes.
validation.newTargetTitleRequired: Enter a name for the new target note template.
